text:
Clubs & Organizations
Student clubs and organizations, such as the NYU Shanghai Student Government, Youth League, Model United Nations Club, and "Thespians" Theatre Club, represent a vast diversity of interests and play an important role in developing student leaders and creating community at NYU Shanghai. The university strives to work with the student body to provide opportunities for students to meet, engage, and explore similar interests.
Explore the Club Directory to connect with a student organization that appeals to you, or visit the Starting a New Club page to learn how to build an organization and make a lasting impact on this community.
Club Directory
Starting a New Club
Contact Us
Student Involvement shanghai.involvement@nyu.edu

Explore the Club Directory to connect with a student organization that appeals to you, or visit the Starting a New Club page to learn how to build an organization and make a lasting impact on this community.
